confirmed_facts.fact: The synthetic event window is listed as 4:00 PM-10:00 PM.
The run-of-show assumes setup activities before the confirmed venue access window.

assumptions: Dry bar service is intended to be central to the guest experience, but readiness is not approved by this packet.
unknowns: Whether load-out after venue close is approved.
Whether compliance, accessibility, safety, and budget-impacting questions have human owner decisions.

source_conflicts.claim: Run-of-show assumes early access while venue notes confirm later access.
source_conflicts.human_review_need: Operations and founder review required before treating setup timing as settled.

source_conflicts.claim: Run-of-show cleanup extends past the venue-requested final load-out time.
source_conflicts.human_review_need: Venue extension and staffing review required.

findings: Human review needed: confirm whether early access and post-close load-out are approved.
Human review needed: confirm door, dry bar support, floater, and cleanup ownership.
Human review needed: reconcile hand-carry load-in and final load-out constraints.
Human review needed: confirm supplies, setup, service support, and floor protection.
Human review needed: reconcile sound cutoff and power assumptions.
Human review needed: confirm door coverage and guest flow before public messaging.
Human review needed: accessibility, safety, COI, and permit sufficiency are not determined.
Human review needed: rental, staffing, equipment, and venue-extension costs require approval.
Human review needed: confirm early access.
Human review needed: confirm load-out extension.
Human review needed: confirm dry bar supply owner.

risk_notes: This packet surfaces blockers for human review and does not approve operational action.
approval_needs: Human approval required before outreach, schedule commitments, public messaging, source-of-truth updates, compliance decisions, accessibility or safety determinations, and budget-impacting commitments.
recommended_next_human_review_step: Operations and Governance should review the timing, load-out, dry bar, compliance, accessibility, safety, and budget blockers before any action.
human_review_required_before: compliance, accessibility, safety, or budget decisions
draft_warning: Synthetic local test packet. Draft for human review only. This packet does not approve, clear, certify, or declare the event ready.
